sources.issuing_organisation: US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
sources.jurisdiction: United States; international infectious-dermatology evidence requiring UAE adaptation
sources.population: Children and adults with molluscum contagiosum, including people who are immunosuppressed.
sources.clinical_setting: Primary care, pediatrics, sexual health, and dermatology recognition and review.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for documenting characteristic papules, central depression, size, inflammation, redness, swelling, pain context, course, lesion burden, and immunosuppression. It does not generate diagnosis, treatment, procedure, sexual-health conclusion, or follow-up.

exact_sections.heading: Clinical features
exact_sections.locator: official HCP page, Clinical features section
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting small pearly papules, central depression, approximate lesion size, pain status, inflammation, redness, swelling, and interval course.

exact_sections.heading: Key points and clinical-features risk context
exact_sections.locator: official HCP page, Key points and Clinical features
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording pediatric or adult context, lesion number and size, immunosuppression, and secondary bacterial infection concern without inferring a complication.
